query:
ALTER TABLE dailyCards 
  ADD COLUMN breakfastRestaurantId INT NULL AFTER securityPhone,
  ADD COLUMN lunchRestaurantId INT NULL AFTER breakfastRestaurant,
  ADD COLUMN dinnerRestaurantId INT NULL AFTER lunchRestaurant;
